name: Herbie Lovelle
abstract: Herbert Edward Lovelle (June 1, 1924 – April 8, 2009) was an American drummer, who played jazz, R&B, rock, and folk. He was also a studio musician and an actor.

concerts.label: Concert for the Benefit of the Scholarship Fund of Lincoln University

works.t: Portraits of a People, a Tribute to Langston Hughes

about_quotes.speaker: Buck Clayton
about_quotes.evidence: I took Buddy Tate and Earl Warren, Dickie Wells and Emmett Berry, Herbie Lovelle, Al Williams and who else?
